module alu(
    input wire [7:0] a,
    input wire [7:0] b,
    input wire [1:0] op,
    output reg [7:0] result
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (op)
            2'b00: result = a + b; // ADD
            2'b01: result = a - b; // SUB
            2'b10: result = a & b; // AND
            2'b11: result = a | b; // OR
            default: result = 8'b0; // Default case
        endcase
    end
endmodule
full_code:
// Implement a simple ALU that supports ADD, SUB, AND, OR operations based on a 2-bit opcode.
module alu(
    input wire [7:0] a,
    input wire [7:0] b,
    input wire [1:0] op,
    output reg [7:0] result
);
module alu(
    input wire [7:0] a,
    input wire [7:0] b,
    input wire [1:0] op,
    output reg [7:0] result
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (op)
            2'b00: result = a + b; // ADD
            2'b01: result = a - b; // SUB
            2'b10: result = a & b; // AND
            2'b11: result = a | b; // OR
            default: result = 8'b0; // Default case
        endcase
    end
endmodule

full_code:
// Implement a vending machine FSM. Accept nickels (5 cents) and dimes (10 cents). Dispense when total >= 15 cents and give change.
module vending(
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire nickel,
    input wire dime,
    output reg dispense,
    output reg [3:0] change
);
module vending(
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire nickel,
    input wire dime,
    output reg dispense,
    output reg [3:0] change
);
    // State definition
    typedef enum reg [2:0] {
        S0,      // Initial state
        S5,      // 5 cents
        S10,     // 10 cents
        S15,     // 15 cents
        S20,     // 20 cents
        S25,     // 25 cents
        S30,     // 30 cents

completion:
module counter(
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst_n,
    input wire en,
    output reg [7:0] count
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (!rst_n) begin
            count <= 8'b0;
        end else if (en) begin
            count <= count + 1'b1;
        end
    end
endmodule

module shift_reg(
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst_n,
    input wire si,
    output reg [7:0] po
);

always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        po <= 8'b00000000;
    end else begin
        po <= {po[6:0], si};
    end
end

endmodule

// Implement a FIFO controller with read/write pointers, full/empty flags. Depth is 8.
module fifo_ctrl(
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire wr,
    input wire rd,
    output reg full,
    output reg empty,
    output reg [2:0] wr_ptr,
    output reg [2:0] rd_ptr
);
